name: brand-system-kit
description: An executable style system for business documents: DTCG token source-of-truth, a lint gate, a WCAG checker, document templates, a visual-critique loop, and a Claude Code skill that scaffolds your own style.

scripts.build: for p in profiles/*/; do node tooling/build-tokens.mjs "${p}tokens.json" "${p}brand.css" --md "${p}color-system.md"; done
scripts.contrast: for p in profiles/*/; do node tooling/contrast-check.mjs "$p"; done
